ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for Elisa Lindenmayer (Petitioner).

The Court questions if the contingency fee agreement was intended to cover all of the administrative costs. Ms. Ebey stated that it was for the litigation, and that since then more time has been expended since there was almost a breach of the settlement agreement. The Sixth and Final Report of Personal Representative on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elisa Lindenmayer (Administrator).

Ms. Ebey apologized to the Court and stated that there are a couple of creditors that they are trying to negotiate with and rather than spend time on preparing a status report, she would rather do a petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to June 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Ebey that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration needs to be filed by June 3, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement And For Approval Of Attorney Fees On Contingency Fee Agreement And Reimbursement Of Costs Advanced By Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elisa Lindemayer.

Ms. Ebey provided a revised order, stated that she wants to reserve her right to come back and request extraordinary fees at the time of final distribution, that there was a sudden attack on the estate assets, that they had to act quickly and that there was no time to do a fully noticed request for the contingency fees. Ms. Ebey also stated that all of the parties have consented, that the beneficiaries really need the money and that this was an emergency situation. The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Continued To Mar-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elisa Lindenmayer (Administrator).
David Ratner for Mark Sackett (Decedent's Ex Husband).

Mr. Ratner stated that his Client has filed a civil lawsuit seeking to quiet title and an 850 Petition in Probate. Ms. Ebey stated that service of her petition was proper, but she has not e filed the proof of service. The Court noted that this matter has been continued, that at the last hearing Ms. Ebey requested more time to file a correct proof of service and admonished Ms. Ebey for failure to do so. Mr. Ratner stated that he is not going to object to continued administration. Discussion was held with regard to whether or not Ms. Ebey needs to amend her petition. The Second Report of Status of Administration is continued to March 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Ebey to get service of what's existing correct.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Elisa Lindenmayer (Administrator).

Ms. Ebey requested a continuance for the purpose of including the required language in the proof of service. The Second Report of Status of Administration is continued to March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
